description: Composition Blue polo t-shirt made of 100% polyester with Climalite fabric, has short sleeves with the adidas patented 3-Stripe, half buttoned placket, panel stitch on the chest and sleeves and embroidered branding on the left chest Fit Regular Wash care Wash dark colours separately at less than 30 degrees Do not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean Cool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logo Look cool while working out in this T-shirt from adidas. The Climalite fabric keeps you feeling fresh and comfortable all day long by drawing seat away from the skin. Adidas ClimaLite features cotton yarns on the face and synthetic fibers inside that wick moisture from the skin to the fabrics surface for easy evaporation. Team this tee with tracks and performance shoes and train better and longer. You can also wear this with jeans and canvas shoes for a sporty off-duty look. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
